name: TypeScript Studio
description: A bright, airy studio with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a vast npm registry. The walls are decorated with type definitions — interfaces, generics, and discriminated unions arranged like abstract art. A warm golden light filters through, the color of type inference. The studio hums with the quiet energy of a bundler running in watch mode.
look_text: The studio is organized by abstraction layer. Near the entrance: type-safe API design patterns, their interfaces clean and self-documenting. Center desks: rapid prototyping workstations with hot-module reloading — change a file, see results in milliseconds. Far wall: browser integration demos, canvas elements rendering Eisenstein lattices in real-time. A small shrine to TypeScript 5.0+ decorators sits in the corner.

exits.description: The bare-metal workshop, where every byte is accounted for
The vast library, full of ecosystem knowledge
The armory, where C is being reforged
The lattice gallery above, where hexagons tile the ceiling

recipes.name: type-safe snap API
recipes.description: A fully typed Eisenstein snap API with branded types for lattice coordinates, compile-time dimension checking, and runtime validation via zod schemas.

recipes.name: browser lattice renderer
recipes.description: A WebGL canvas renderer for Eisenstein lattices. Type-safe shader uniforms, real-time snap visualization, zero-dependency rendering pipeline.
